thinks.think: Several individuals ride longboards down a wide, tree-lined road. A skater in a black shirt and bright yellow helmet is prominent on the right, while another in a blue shirt and white helmet rides to the left. Further ahead, more people on skateboards and bicycles move forward along the white dashed lane markers. Cars are visible on the far right side of the street.

A skater in a light blue shirt and white helmet moves centrally into the foreground, riding away from the camera. To the left, a person wearing a bright orange safety vest stands stationary near the curb. The skater with the yellow helmet continues riding on the right side, while other cyclists and skaters remain visible further down the tree-lined road.

The skater in the light blue shirt moves closer to the camera on the left side. The individual with the yellow helmet is clearly seen wearing a patterned backpack and knee pads while riding on the right. Ahead, a person in a brown shirt and jeans skates centrally, following others further down the tree-lined road.

The camera advances past the skater in the light blue shirt on the left. The skater wearing a yellow helmet and backpack continues riding on the right. On the far right, a white sedan, a red car, and a green-and-white taxi are visible near the curb as the group proceeds down the tree-lined avenue.

A skateboard lies on the asphalt in the center lane. The skater in the brown shirt and jeans rides centrally, while the individual with the yellow helmet maintains position on the right. Further ahead, cyclists and other skaters proceed down the avenue. On the far right, a green-and-white taxi and other vehicles are visible near the curb.

A skater wearing a grey hoodie crouches low on a longboard at the bottom left edge. The individual in the brown shirt skates centrally, while the person with the yellow helmet and backpack continues on the right. Further ahead, cyclists and other skaters proceed down the tree-lined avenue.

A person wearing a bright orange safety vest stands on the left side of the road. A skater in a red shirt rides away on the right, while an individual in a grey hoodie crouches low on a longboard on the left. Other skaters in brown and white shirts continue down the avenue.

A skater in a red shirt rides on the left side of the lane, leaning forward. Ahead, a person in a brown shirt skates centrally. To their right, an individual in a white shirt with a black backpack skates forward, looking back. Further ahead on the right, the skater with the bright yellow helmet continues down the avenue.

A skater in a red shirt reaches out and clasps hands with a skater in a white shirt wearing a black backpack, forming a line while skating. A skater in a brown shirt rides between them. On the far left edge, a skater in a light blue shirt and white helmet reappears. The individual with the bright yellow helmet continues skating ahead on the right side of the road.

A person in a red shirt is seen from behind in the foreground. Ahead, a skater in a red shirt reaches out to hold hands with a skater in a white shirt and backpack. A skater in a light blue shirt rides on the left. The skater with the yellow helmet continues down the road on the right.

A skater in a white shirt with a large black backpack moves into the center foreground. To their right, a skater in a red shirt rides parallel. On the left, another skater in a red shirt and one in a light blue shirt are visible. The group continues skating down the tree-lined road.

A skater in a white shirt and large black backpack moves into the immediate foreground, revealing grey pants and black knee pads. To the right, a person in a red shirt skates forward. On the far left, a skater in a light blue shirt is partially visible. The group proceeds down the paved road.

A skater in a white shirt and grey backpack continues forward, extending an arm. To their left, a person in a brown shirt and blue jeans rides a longboard. On the right, a curb lined with bright orange flowers passes by. Other skaters remain visible further ahead down the tree-lined avenue.

A skater in a white shirt and grey backpack carves on a longboard with yellow wheels in the center foreground. To the left, a person in a brown shirt and blue jeans pushes off the asphalt with one foot to propel forward. On the right, the curb transitions to red brick paving as the group continues down the avenue, with other skaters visible ahead.

A skater in a light blue shirt and white helmet pushes with their left foot in the left foreground. Centrally, a skater in a white shirt and grey backpack rides forward, following a skater in a brown shirt. To the right, a skater in a red shirt moves near the curb lined with orange flowers as the group proceeds down the avenue.

A skater in a light blue shirt and white helmet rides with both feet on the board left. Centrally, a skater in a white shirt and grey backpack moves forward, while a skater in a red shirt rides near the right curb with flowers. Ahead, a skater in a brown shirt and blue jeans leads the group down the tree-lined avenue.

A person in an orange safety vest stands on the left curb. A skater in a light blue shirt and white helmet rides left, while a skater in a white shirt with a grey backpack moves centrally. To the right, a skater in a red shirt rides near the greenery. Ahead, other skaters and cyclists continue down the avenue.

Cyclists appear among the skaters: a person in a purple shirt rides centrally, and another in a white tank top and blue shorts pedals near the right curb. The skater in the light blue shirt and white helmet remains left, while the backpack-wearing skater stays central, and the red-shirted skater rides right.

A cyclist in a white shirt with a black bag rides on the left. Centrally, a skater with a grey backpack follows the group. On the right, a young girl on a pink bicycle appears. White directional arrows painted on the asphalt guide the flow as skaters and cyclists proceed down the tree-lined avenue.

Yellow diagonal road markings appear on the asphalt as the group advances. A skater in a red shirt rides centrally next to a person in a light blue shirt and white helmet. To the left, a cyclist in a white shirt with a black bag pedals forward. The skaters pass over the painted zone.

Yellow diagonal road markings cover the asphalt as the group rides over the painted zone. A skater in a red shirt extends arms for balance while crossing the stripes. To the left, a skater in a light blue shirt turns his head to look back towards the camera. A cyclist pedals on the far left edge.

summary.text:
[0-4] Several individuals ride longboards down a wide, tree-lined road. A skater in a black shirt and bright yellow helmet is on the right, while another in a blue shirt and white helmet rides left. Ahead, others on skateboards and bicycles move forward. A person in a bright orange safety vest stands near the left curb.
[4-8] The light blue-shirted skater moves closer left. The yellow-helmeted individual wears a patterned backpack and knee pads right. Ahead, a person in a brown shirt and jeans skates centrally. Cars, including a white sedan, red car, and taxi, are visible right.
[8-12] A skateboard lies on the asphalt in the center lane. The brown-shirted skater rides centrally, while the yellow-helmeted individual stays right. A skater in a grey hoodie crouches low on a longboard at the bottom left. Further ahead, cyclists and skaters proceed down the avenue.

[12-14] A person in an orange safety vest stands on the left as a skater in a red shirt rides right and a grey-hooded skater crouches low. Others in brown and white shirts skate ahead. [14-18] The red-shirted skater moves left, joining a line where they clasp hands with a skater in a white shirt and black backpack, sandwiching a brown-shirted skater. A skater in a light blue shirt and white helmet appears on the left, while a yellow-helmeted skater leads on the right. [18-24] The camera follows the white-shirted skater with the backpack into the foreground, revealing grey pants and knee pads. The red-shirted skater rides parallel to the right, while the light blue-shirted skater remains on the left. [24-26] The white-shirted skater extends an arm while skating near a person in a brown shirt and blue jeans. To the right, a curb lined with bright orange flowers passes by as the group continues down the tree-lined avenue.

[26-30] A skater in a white shirt and grey backpack carves centrally on yellow wheels, flanked by a skater in a brown shirt and blue jeans pushing left and a skater in a red shirt near the right curb with red bricks. [30-34] A skater in a light blue shirt and white helmet joins left. A person in an orange safety vest stands on the left curb as the group proceeds. [34-36] Cyclists mix in: a cyclist in a purple shirt rides centrally, and another in a white tank top and blue shorts pedals near the right curb.

[42-44] A skater in a light blue shirt and white helmet looks back while riding left, alongside a skater in a red shirt who also turns back as they cross yellow diagonal markings. A cyclist in a yellow shirt is visible behind. [44-50] The group advances: the red-shirted skater rides left, while centrally, a skater in a brown shirt and blue jeans moves near an individual in a white shirt with a backpack. To the right, a skater in a black shirt, yellow helmet, and backpack rides a longboard. Further ahead, cyclists and skaters continue down the tree-lined avenue.

[40-42] Yellow diagonal road markings cover the asphalt as the group rides over the painted zone; a skater in a red shirt extends arms for balance while crossing the stripes, a skater in a light blue shirt turns his head back, and a cyclist pedals on the far left edge. [50-58] Proceeding down a tree-lined avenue, a skater in a red shirt and grey pants rides on the left. Centrally, a skater in a white shirt with a black backpack moves forward. To the right, a skater in a brown shirt and blue jeans pushes off alongside an individual in a yellow helmet and backpack. A cyclist in white is visible on the far right edge. The group passes a curb lined with red bricks and vegetation, heading toward a distant structure.

From 58-60s, a skater in a red shirt rides left, while a central skater in a white shirt with a black backpack pushes with their left foot. To the right, a skater in a brown shirt and blue jeans pushes with their right foot, and a skater in a yellow helmet rides near the green curb. By 60-62s, approaching a distant stone structure, a dark sedan travels right. The red-shirted skater stays left, and the white-shirted skater moves centrally over white road lettering. At 62-64s, a skater in a light blue shirt and white helmet enters the left foreground as the group passes large white '60' markings. From 64-66s, the light blue-shirted skater remains left. The brown-shirted skater is now central, while a red-shirted skater rides right. Finally, at 66-68s, the light blue-shirted skater is left. The brown-shirted skater pushes centrally, and the red-shirted skater rides near the right curb as they pass a large white arrow.

[68-70] Large white letters "EM" and "NTE" appear on the asphalt. A skater in a light blue shirt rides left, while skaters in brown and red shirts move centrally and right. Cyclists approach a distant stone wall.
[70-72] A cyclist with a red backpack rides right, while the skater in the light blue shirt is in the left foreground. Skaters in red and brown shirts move toward the wall. An orange traffic cone sits on the right curb.
